name: JMA high school
description:
Wings of fire as humans. No prophecies, no abilities, just normal high school, drama, fights, and stuff like that.


There are 6 Winglets one could be a part of, the X wingwinglet, theJade winglet, the Copper winglet, the gold winglet, the silver winglet, and the quartz winglet. each winglet can hold a maximum of 20 kids.

Jade winglet members: Clay, Sunny, Peril, Starflight, Fatespeaker, Tsunami, Riptide, Glory, Deathbringer, Qibli, Moonwatcher(Moon for short), Winter, Kinkajou, Umber, Carnelian and Turtle.

X(main rival) winglet: Astaroth, Nocturnal, Aigeus, Soulcatcher(Soul for short), Deadeye, Shadowknight, Sonata, Zoey, Striker, Oceana, Everglade, Vex, Nova, Oceana, Crafter, Phoenixrose

Marching band show of the year: Shattered by Luke McMilan, The musicmania one I put is incorrect, but I couldn't find the show on Soundcloud, if ya'll know how to use something other than soundcloud let me know, please. Here's the real show. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=b3PpcF92lCI
Enjoy!

(This is my first Music mania tag) :O

If ya'll have any problems, tell me and I'll see if i can fix it.
